creator: alster@vinterdalen.se
text:
Created attachment 250936
[PATCH] sysutils/ncdu2: update 2.3 → 2.4

Options for stripping binaries were removed from both BUILD_ARGS and patch-build.zig, as it seems like no options for stripping binaries are in Zig 0.12

See also https://github.com/ziglang/zig/issues/19811
